meta.title: Professional Fitness Studio
meta.description: Reach your goals with expert trainers at our studio.
meta.aboutDescription: Learn more about Park Personal Training and our expert team.
meta.servicesDescription: Explore all our training services and programs.
meta.trainersDescription: Meet our expert trainers who are dedicated to helping you achieve your fitness goals.
meta.musicDescription: Discover the Spotify playlists we play at our studio to keep you motivated during your workout.
meta.contactDescription: Get in touch with Park Personal Training. Visit us or send us a message.

hero.subtitle: The right place to reach your goals. Become the best version of yourself with personalized programs led by expert trainers.

about.label: About Us
about.p1: We know every individual is different. Our expert trainers analyze your goals, lifestyle, and physical condition to create a workout and nutrition plan that is completely tailored to you.
about.p2: From small group classes to one-on-one training sessions, we offer a program for everyone. Professional equipment and a welcoming atmosphere await you at our studio.

services.label: Our Services
services.heading: What Do We Offer?
services.description: We support you in the best way possible with programs suitable for every level and goal.

trainers.label: Our Team
trainers.heading: Expert Trainers
trainers.description: Our certified and experienced trainers are here to help you reach your goals.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Take Action
contact.description: Have a question? Reach us on Instagram or fill out the form below.
contact.successMessage: Your message was sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contact.validationError: Please fill in all required fields.
contact.sendError: Unable to send message. Please try again later.
contact.previewDescription: Get in touch with our team to discuss your fitness goals.

playlists.label: Music
playlists.heading: Playlists
playlists.p1: Train to the sound of our gym.
playlists.p2: Discover the Spotify playlists we play on the floor to keep energy high, motivation strong, and every workout moving.
